evidence: add->{"acknowledged":true}; GET /_aliases then shows audit-aliases-idx:{aliases:{audit-aliases-a1:{}}}; later remove made a1 vanish (GET /_alias/a1 -> {}). Src: loops actions calling engine.add_alias/remove_alias.

Returns {audit-aliases-idx:{aliases:{audit-aliases-a1:{}}}} reflecting real state, but src only iterates engine.aliases entries so indices WITHOUT aliases are omitted (ES lists all). No per-alias filter/routing meta either.
Lists ALL indices incl bench:{aliases:{}} and audit-aliases-idx:{aliases:{audit-aliases-a1:{}}}. Src walks list_indices() x engine.aliases + alias_meta_for().
Returned 200 because alias state non-empty. Src: 404 iff engine.aliases.is_empty() else 200 — reflects real state.
GET /_alias/audit-aliases-a1 -> {audit-aliases-idx:{aliases:{audit-aliases-a1:{}}}}; after remove -> {} (empty, not 404). Src matches alias w/ wildcards across indices.
HEAD /_alias/audit-aliases-a1 -> 200; HEAD /_alias/no-such-alias-xyz -> 404. Src: 200 iff some index carries a matching alias.
GET /audit-aliases-idx/_alias -> {audit-aliases-idx:{aliases:{audit-aliases-a1:{},audit-aliases-a2:{filter:{term:{x:1}},index_routing:r1,search_routing:r1}}}}. Src resolves selector + alias_meta_for.
HEAD /audit-aliases-idx/_alias -> 200; HEAD /bench/_alias (no alias) -> 404. Src: 200 iff index exists AND has >=1 alias.

Lists every real index w/ true doc_count ('bench ... 4008'); audit-* indices present. Src: iterates engine.list_indices(). Note: UUID random per call, store size/shards hardcoded '1 0 .. 0'.
